madness.name: Amnesia
madness.description: The investigator has no memory of events that have taken place since they were last in a safe place.

madness.name: Psychosomatic Disability
madness.description: The investigator suffers psychosomatic blindness, deafness, or loss of the use of a limb for 1D10 rounds.

madness.name: Violence
madness.description: A red mist descends. The investigator explodes in a spree of uncontrolled violence against anything and anyone nearby.

madness.name: Paranoia
madness.description: The investigator suffers severe paranoia; everyone is out to get them; no one can be trusted.

madness.name: Significant Person
madness.description: The investigator mistakes another person for their Significant Person. They act in accordance with their relationship.

madness.name: Faint
madness.description: The investigator faints, losing consciousness for the duration.

madness.name: Flee in Fear
madness.description: The investigator is compelled to get as far away as possible by any means available.

madness.name: Physical Hysteria
madness.description: The investigator is incapacitated by uncontrollable laughing, crying, or screaming.

madness.name: Phobia
madness.description: The investigator develops a new phobia. Even if the source isn't present, they imagine it is.

madness.name: Mania
madness.description: The investigator develops a new mania. They become obsessed with its source for the duration.
